dates.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest concrete artifact set, releasing Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena and introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for more natural, interruption-robust voice interaction. Anthropic also appeared to unveil a new Claude Mythos model, while a separate Lyptus Research paper on offensive cyber task horizons points to growing investor and policy focus on measuring where frontier models can automate higher-risk security work.
